Package org.eventb.internal.core.lexer

Enum Class LexicalClass

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<LexicalClass>
org.eventb.internal.core.lexer.LexicalClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<LexicalClass>, Constable
public enum LexicalClass extends Enum<LexicalClass>
Lexical classes for any BMath grammar (potentially extended).

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static LexicalClass[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static LexicalClass valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • isWhitespace

      protected static boolean isWhitespace(int codePoint)

    • isDigit

      protected static boolean isDigit(int codePoint)

    • isStart

      public abstract boolean isStart(int codePoint)
      Returns whether the given code point is a valid first code point for a lexem of this lexical class.
      Parameters:
      codePoint - a code point
      Returns:
      true iff code point is valid as first of a lexem

    • isPart

      public abstract boolean isPart(int codePoint)
      Returns whether the given code point is a valid part of a lexem of this lexical class. The part here means from the second to the last code point.
      Parameters:
      codePoint - a code point
      Returns:
      true iff code point is valid as part of a lexem

    • getKind

      public abstract int getKind(String lexem, AbstractGrammar grammar)
      Returns the grammatical kind of the given image. The given image MUST be a valid lexem of this lexical class.
      Parameters:
      lexem - a lexem of this class
      grammar - a grammar
      Returns:
      a grammatical kind

    • read

      public boolean read(LexStream stream, AbstractGrammar grammar)
      Reads the stream so as to make the longest lexem of this class. The following must hold when calling the method:
    • isStart(stream.getTokenStart())
    • the stream remained unchanged since latest call to stream.startNext()
      • Parameters:
      stream - a stream
      grammar - a grammar
      Returns:
      true iff reading succeeded

    • contains

      public boolean contains(String str)
      Returns whether the given string is a lexem of this lexical class.
      Parameters:
      str - a string
      Returns:
      true iff the string is a lexem of this lexical class

    • getLexicalClass

      public static LexicalClass getLexicalClass(int startCodePoint)
